description: Yelena Kavanagh leads a discussion on legal challenges for developers in the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of understanding regulatory frameworks and the distinction between securities and non-securities. The panel includes legal experts who share their experiences and insights on navigating the complex landscape of blockchain regulation.
topic_summary: The panel addresses the blurred lines of regulatory compliance for developers in the crypto industry, focusing on the classification of tokens and the implications of securities laws [t=352.21].
